title: CP9 Drops the Disguise
description: Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Franky, Rob Lucci. Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: It's possible to still think that,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We know nothing from your actions...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: The designers' signatures are on there.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: And, finally, the company name, "Tom's workers"

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: But you wouldn't have ever dreamed...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: that your enemies were so close.

summary: Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
